TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ya-ma-sin-i-lin "Pu-taw-ya a kamu, Amaz√īnia, Si-pan-ya a kamu, Amazonia" singangnan aca tu Ya-ma-sin-i-lin, tini i Nan-mey-cow Ya-ma-sun-pen-tiay nu akuti'ay nu siudaay a buyu', picalap nu lala' pakala tu 500 emang pin-bang kuli dada' uyni a sakauzip a buyu' uyza u Ya-ma-sin a sauwac. yadahay a buyu' mibalat miawas tu walu a kanatalan, Pasi "micalap tu kilakilangan payhun 60% ku hekal". zuma sepat a kanatalan ku yadahay udad a buyu' tungusay u cow pangangan han Ya-ma-sin-cow. Ya-ma-sin-i-lin u heka malatusa nu kitakit, hekal nu kilakilangan payhun 21%, u satabakiay nu ticiw atu yadahay aadupan atu mulangaway nu yadahay udad nu akuti'ay a buyu'. maletek ku kilakilangan ś£ģśěóÁ†ćšľź macapi tu payhun lima tu cacay a Ya-ma-sin-i-lin mapeci tu, zuma a uliwan mahiza tu musuayaw tu kalihalawan. i 1990 a mihcaan katukuh 2000 a nihcaasn 10 a mihcaan kaapuyu' nu demiad, Ya-ma-sin-i-lin mapeci'ay a hekal makay 4,150 emang kung-cin macakat katukuh 5,870 emang kung-cin lecaday tu Pu-taw-yaay tu tusa kaahebal nu hekal. angangan lalekalan malukay nu Pa-si a yadah ku nilacu saahebal sa miletek tu yadaay a udad abuyu' paluma' tu kumuh atu sasimalan a cung. "sisimal ku cowng-li" i 2004 a mihcaa 7 a bulad a katatengilan, kesey paayaw tu yadahay udad a buyu' a caay tu kahiza nu ayaway tu paymihcaan masulup ku lasubu emang kun-tun ku labuay a akuti nu bali, lalekalan mangaleb ku kalamkam ku nikapeci' nu yadaay udad a buyu'. uyni 2003 a mihcaan dada', izaw ku 9,169 pin-bang inb-li ku maletekay tu a kilang. śĖľ2004ŚĻī7 . i Pa-siay dada', macaliway tu 90 ku niyazu' nu Yincumincu i 1900 a ziday malawpes nu imelang atu nikalalais, pinaay tu a mihcaan ku nikasuped sakay yadaay udad a buyu' mauzipay aadupan u tineng aca nu isingay malasawad tu. uyni a lala' lalid sa maletek ku kilakilangan mapeci' tu atu masibek tu mapatay ku mulangawa mauzipay, tinaku u Mi-lu Ya-ma-sin, tiniay a Yincumincu haymaw satu mahedaw. . 2023 a mkihca 6 a bulad 5 ademiad, Pa-si a Cung-tung ci Lu-la pangangan tu nisulitan, panutekan i 2030 a mihcaan katukuh Ya-ma-sin-i-lin "inayi' tu ku miletekay" anu pina ku niletekan ahatiza ku nipaluma tu kilang. 2023ŚĻī6śúą5śó•, . kikasumad nu demiad malilid tu ku Ya-ma-sin-i-lin izaw tahkal ku nisulitanYa-ma-sin-i-lin mulangaway iayaw 210,000 a mihcaan, milihiza tu sazikuzay tu nu kuliamim a mihcaan atu kalananuman a mihcaan "deglaciation", tabaki ku nikasumad. namasaheci tu ku kitizaan nu Ya-ma-sin ku-bu "paleolake" atu ku nikasaupu nu maleneknek a tuud, tahkal ku nasulitan sazikuzay a kulian a mihcaan maselep ku udad kikaadidi'an tu nu ayzaan. mahiniay kanca taneng amin zayhan masatancunay a lala' masuemet ku akuti'ay u nikaselep nu lutuk. itawya ahebal ku nikaselep nu lutuk, ke-sye-cya caay kalecad ku nipisakamu. hiniasa ku zuma a ke-sye-cya adidi' tu ku i-lin zuma caay tu kayadah atu kalaliyas nu tanengay a siwawa a kitizaan "refugium", mapalaed nu ahebalay akilakilangan atu nalinabuwan, hinisa ku ke-sya-cya mahizaay tu ku i-lin, uyza u nuamisan, nuwalian atu nutimulan caay kanayat katukuh tu nu ayzaay a kabatud. 005 a mihcaan, Ya-ma-sin milihiza tu 100 a mihcaan tu pihacengay a kakelad, lalid tu sakatusa a mihcaan nu kakedal. 2006 a mihca 7 a bulad 23 a demiad , I-ng-kow pasakamu i wangcan, Lin-tung migingkiway a cungsin "Woods Hole Research Center" patahal tu pulung a kawaw, uyza u kayadah ku liletekan tu kilang, sisa makedal tu ku Ya-ma-sin, kalamkam a hamin nu kakitizaan micuzuh pasayza i "nikasumad" "Ing a kamu, "tipping point" anu yadahay udad a buyu' amanukas tu malingatu mapatay. kilakilangan i tapiingan tu nu likelikenan, sakay hamin nu ti-ciw malilid nu demiad a masatubuc. Hhkay a malawpes ku kitakit. . pihaceng ku kaliidŚöīťáćŚĹĪťüŅ makay 2019 a mihcaan malingatu, Ya-ma-sin yadahay udad zayhan macaliway tu ku niletekan, nu hekalay, kikasumad nu demiad a kawaw tultultul sa a matuduh, katukuh 2019 a mihca 8 a bulad, Ya-ma-sin-i-lin i 8 a bulad tu cayay katanayu'a demiad pakal tu 4 emang ku nikatuduh, palalecad tuyza a mihcaan tu 2018 a mihcaan macunus tu ku 77% pasen. A-mey-lika a kanatal pulung nu pahikukiay "NASA" patahkal tu pinaay i 8 a bulad nisasing nu wiy-sin tahkal ku nisasingan,Lang-tu -ni-ya-cow atu Ya-ma-sin-cow zayhan namakatuduh tu nu wacah satu ku tapuku, uyni a wacah i pabaw nu Ya-ma-sin a sauwac masacacayay a salining, i Pa-si kasakitizaan mulalad, tuwaca laed tu Lang-towni-ya-cow 2200 kung-liay a Sin-paw-low a ktizaan, malilid tu nu waca a nikatuduh nu kilakilangan, mahetik ku "lumeni'ay a udad", u nipatatenga' i udad izaw ku nisuped tu masaatiladay a nikatuduhan. i-lin namatuduh tiniay i yadahay udad a buyu' nu muenengay aadupan yadah ku mapatayay. ayzaay katukuh tu tulu a lalipayan a nikatuduh caay edapen nu tiniay Pa-siay a tademaw, yu matineng tuyni a kawaw ku kitakitay zikuz, Pa-si cong-tung ci Ya-i-al¬∑Poe-su-na-low makaynah tu, Ow-COW a binawlan amin sabeleng satu tazazan musakamu tu Pa-si a pipadeng tu lamal, , Ya-i-al¬∑Pow-su-na-low-i zayhan Ba-kow cung-tung ci Ma-ke-hung paewang i G7 satabakiay a kaygian a palaayaw matatengil tu nikatuduh nu Ya-ma-sin uyni kacenuhan a kawaw atu u silaeday masasukaynah, Ya-i-al¬∑Pow-su-na-low hinisa "milihizaay tu kawaw nu Pa-si" atu hinisa "caay pabeli tu kalisie a miedap tu katuudh ku Pa-si". satu Ya-i-al¬∑Pow-su-na-low-I penecen tu cin-ciw kya paculcul tu hitay papipaneng tu lamal. zuma a kanatal malingatu tu sida'it ku tademaw amin u liyuh nu Pa-si a cen-hu atu Ya-ma-sin-i-lin anuayaw a kalihanawan. uyni tabakiay a nikatuduh mabuhat tu ku nuayaway nu Ya-ma-sin-i-lin ahebal ku nikacunus tu niletekan atu Ya-i-al¬∑Pow-su-na-low-I tu kalungad nu i-lin a kungku. u matuayay nu Pow-su-na-low caay kaaku sa pakalingestu tu Pa-si a kanatal tay-kung migingkiway a yen-cang ci Li-ka-tow¬∑cya-al-wang "Ricardo Galvao", malingatu tu masasukaynah a tatusa. zikuz Pow-su-na-low i pipenec nu kasakitakit hawsa pasakamu tu hamin nu kanatal i 60 a demiad lacus a tuduhen ku kilang tu pilisimet tu sakalukan a lala'. (Ricardo Galvao)ŚŹćśďä, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == ja-ma-sin-i-r~…ĺin "pu-taw-ja a kamu, amaz*nia, si-pan-ja a kamu, amazonia" siŇčaŇčnan a ¶a tu ja-ma-sin-i-r~…ĺin, tini i nan-m…ô- ¶ow ja-ma-sun-p…ôn-tiaj nu akuti Ē~ °aj nu siudaaj a buju Ē~ °, pi ¶ar~…ĺap nu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° pakar~…ĺa tu *** …ômaŇč pin-baŇč kur~…ĺi dada Ē~ ° ujni a sakauzip a buju Ē~ ° ujza u ja-ma-sin a sauwa ¶. jadańßaj a buju Ē~ ° mibar~…ĺat miawas tu war~…ĺu a kanatar~…ĺan, pasi "mi ¶ar~…ĺap tu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan pajńßun **% ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺ". zuma s…ôpat a kanatar~…ĺan ku jadańßaj udad a buju Ē~ ° tuŇčusaj u ¶ow paŇčaŇčan ńßan ja-ma-sin- ¶ow. ja-ma-sin-i-r~…ĺin u ńß…ôka mar~…ĺatusa nu kitakit, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan pajńßun **%, u satabakiaj nu ti ¶iw atu jadańßaj aadupan atu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj nu jadańßaj udad nu akuti Ē~ °aj a buju Ē~ °. mar~…ĺ…ôt…ôk ku kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan **** ma ¶api tu pajńßun r~…ĺima tu ¶a ¶aj a ja-ma-sin-i-r~…ĺin map…ô ¶i tu, zuma a ur~…ĺiwan mańßiza tu musuajaw tu kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺawan. i **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß **** a nińß ¶aasn ** a mińß ¶aan kaapuju Ē~ ° nu d…ômiad, ja-ma-sin-i-r~…ĺin map…ô ¶i Ē~ °aj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ makaj *,*** …ômaŇč kuŇč- ¶in ma ¶akat katukuńß *,*** …ômaŇč kuŇč- ¶in r~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj tu pu-taw-jaaj tu tusa kaańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ. aŇčaŇčan r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan mar~…ĺukaj nu pa-si a jadańß ku nir~…ĺa ¶u saańß…ôbar~…ĺ sa mir~…ĺ…ôt…ôk tu jadaaj a udad abuju Ē~ ° par~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tu kumuńß atu sasimar~…ĺan a ¶uŇč. "sisimar~…ĺ ku ¶owŇč-r~…ĺi" i **** a mińß ¶aa * a bur~…ĺad a katat…ôŇčir~…ĺan, k…ôs…ô paajaw tu jadańßaj udad a buju Ē~ ° a ¶aaj tu kańßiza nu ajawaj tu pajmińß ¶aan masur~…ĺup ku r~…ĺasubu …ômaŇč kun-tun ku r~…ĺabuaj a akuti nu bar~…ĺi, r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb ku kar~…ĺamkam ku nikap…ô ¶i Ē~ ° nu jadaaj udad a buju Ē~ °. ujni **** a mińß ¶aan dada Ē~ °, izaw ku *,*** pin-baŇč inb-r~…ĺi ku mar~…ĺ…ôt…ôkaj tu a kir~…ĺaŇč. ******* . i pa-siaj dada Ē~ °, ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu ** ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu jin ¶umin ¶u i **** a zidaj mar~…ĺawp…ôs nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč atu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺais, pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan ku nikasup…ôd sakaj jadaaj udad a buju Ē~ ° mauzipaj aadupan u tin…ôŇč a ¶a nu isiŇčaj mar~…ĺasawad tu. ujni a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° r~…ĺar~…ĺid sa mar~…ĺ…ôt…ôk ku kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan map…ô ¶i Ē~ ° tu atu masib…ôk tu mapataj ku mur~…ĺaŇčawa mauzipaj, tinaku u mi-r~…ĺu ja-ma-sin, tiniaj a jin ¶umin ¶u ńßajmaw satu mańß…ôdaw. . **** a mkińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * ad…ômiad, pa-si a ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i r~…ĺu-r~…ĺa paŇčaŇčan tu nisur~…ĺitan, panut…ôkan i **** a mińß ¶aan katukuńß ja-ma-sin-i-r~…ĺin "inaji Ē~ ° tu ku mir~…ĺ…ôt…ôkaj" anu pina ku nir~…ĺ…ôt…ôkan ańßatiza ku nipar~…ĺuma tu kir~…ĺaŇč. ¶…ôŇčaj a kak…ôr~…ĺad, r~…ĺar~…ĺid tu sakatusa a mińß ¶aan nu kak…ôdar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad , i-Ňč-kow pasakamu i waŇč ¶an, r~…ĺin-tuŇč migiŇčkiwaj a ¶uŇčsin "woods ńßor~…ĺ…ô nu d…ômiad a masatubu ¶. ńßńßkaj a mar~…ĺawp…ôs ku kitakit. . pińßa ¶…ôŇč ku kar~…ĺiid**** makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ja-ma-sin jadańßaj udad zajńßan ma ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu ku nir~…ĺ…ôt…ôkan, nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj, kikasumad nu d…ômiad a kawaw tur~…ĺtur~…ĺtur~…ĺ sa a matuduńß, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ja-ma-sin-i-r~…ĺin i * a bur~…ĺad tu ¶ajaj katanaju Ē~ °a d…ômiad pakar~…ĺ tu * …ômaŇč ku nikatuduńß, par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tujza a mińß ¶aan tu **** a mińß ¶aan ma ¶unus tu ku **% pas…ôn. a-m…ô-r~…ĺika a kanatar~…ĺ pur~…ĺuŇč nu pańßikukiaj "nasa" patańßkar~…ĺ tu pinaaj i * a bur~…ĺad nisasiŇč nu wij-sin tańßkar~…ĺ ku nisasiŇčan,r~…ĺaŇč-tu -ni-ja- ¶ow atu ja-ma-sin- ¶ow zajńßan namakatuduńß tu nu wa ¶ańß satu ku tapuku, ujni a wa ¶ańß i pabaw nu ja-ma-sin a sauwa ¶ masa ¶a ¶ajaj a sar~…ĺiniŇč, i pa-si kasakitizaan mur~…ĺar~…ĺad, tuwa ¶a r~…ĺa…ôd tu r~…ĺaŇč-towni-ja- ¶ow **** kuŇč-r~…ĺiaj a sin-paw-r~…ĺow a ktizaan, mar~…ĺir~…ĺid tu nu wa ¶a a nikatuduńß nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, mańß…ôtik ku "r~…ĺum…ôni Ē~ °aj a udad", u nipatat…ôŇča Ē~ ° i udad izaw ku nisup…ôd tu masaatir~…ĺadaj a nikatuduńßan. i-r~…ĺin namatuduńß tiniaj i jadańßaj udad a buju Ē~ ° nu mu…ôn…ôŇčaj aadupan jadańß ku mapatajaj. ajzaaj katukuńß tu tur~…ĺu a r~…ĺar~…ĺipajan a nikatuduńß ¶aaj …ôdap…ôn nu tiniaj pa-siaj a tad…ômaw, ju matin…ôŇč tujni a kawaw ku kitakitaj zikuz, pa-si ¶oŇč-tuŇč ¶i ja-i-ar~…ĺ*po…ô-su-na-r~…ĺow makajnańß tu, ow- ¶ow a binawr~…ĺan amin sab…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč satu tazazan musakamu tu pa-si a pipad…ôŇč tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ, , ja-i-ar~…ĺ*pow-su-na-r~…ĺow-i zajńßan ba-kow ¶uŇč-tuŇč ¶i ma-k…ô-ńßuŇč pa…ôwaŇč i g* satabakiaj a kajgian a par~…ĺaajaw matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu nikatuduńß nu ja-ma-sin ujni ka ¶…ônuńßan a kawaw atu u sir~…ĺa…ôdaj masasukajnańß, ja-i-ar~…ĺ*pow-su-na-r~…ĺow ńßinisa "mir~…ĺińßizaaj tu kawaw nu pa-si" atu ńßinisa " ¶aaj pab…ôr~…ĺi tu kar~…ĺisi…ô a mi…ôdap tu katuudńß ku pa-si". satu ja-i-ar~…ĺ*pow-su-na-r~…ĺow-i p…ôn…ô ¶…ôn tu ¶in- ¶iw kja pa ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ tu ńßitaj papipan…ôŇč tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ. zuma a kanatar~…ĺ mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu sida Ē~ °it ku tad…ômaw amin u r~…ĺijuńß nu pa-si a ¶…ôn-ńßu atu ja-ma-sin-i-r~…ĺin anuajaw a kar~…ĺińßanawan. ujni tabakiaj a nikatuduńß mabuńßat tu ku nuajawaj nu ja-ma-sin-i-r~…ĺin ańß…ôbar~…ĺ ku nika ¶unus tu nir~…ĺ…ôt…ôkan atu ja-i-ar~…ĺ*pow-su-na-r~…ĺow-i tu kar~…ĺuŇčad nu i-r~…ĺin a kuŇčku. u matuajaj nu pow-su-na-r~…ĺow ¶aaj kaaku sa pakar~…ĺiŇč…ôstu tu pa-si a kanatar~…ĺ taj-kuŇč migiŇčkiwaj a j…ôn- ¶aŇč ¶i r~…ĺi-ka-tow* ¶ja-ar~…ĺ-waŇč "*i ¶ardo gar~…ĺ*ao", mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu masasukajnańß a tatusa. zikuz pow-su-na-r~…ĺow i pip…ôn…ô ¶ nu kasakitakit ńßawsa pasakamu tu ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ i ** a d…ômiad r~…ĺa ¶us a tuduńß…ôn ku kir~…ĺaŇč tu pir~…ĺisim…ôt tu sakar~…ĺukan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. (*i ¶ardo gar~…ĺ*ao)**, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Ya-ma-sin-i-lin "Pu-taw-ya a kamu, Amaz√īnia, Si-pan-ya a kamu, Amazonia" singangnan aca tu Ya-ma-sin-i-lin, tini i Nan-mey-cow Ya-ma-sun-pen-tiay nu akuti'ay nu siudaay a buyu', picalap nu lala' pakala tu 500 emang pin-bang kuli dada' uyni a sakauzip a buyu' uyza u Ya-ma-sin a sauwac. yadahay a buyu' mibalat miawas tu walu a kanatalan, Pasi "micalap tu kilakilangan payhun 60% ku hekal". zuma sepat a kanatalan ku yadahay udad a buyu' tungusay u cow pangangan han Ya-ma-sin-cow. Ya-ma-sin-i-lin u heka malatusa nu kitakit, hekal nu kilakilangan payhun 21%, u satabakiay nu ticiw atu yadahay aadupan atu mulangaway nu yadahay udad nu akuti'ay a buyu'. maletek ku kilakilangan ś£ģśěóÁ†ćšľź macapi tu payhun lima tu cacay a Ya-ma-sin-i-lin mapeci tu, zuma a uliwan mahiza tu musuayaw tu kalihalawan. i 1990 a mihcaan katukuh 2000 a nihcaasn 10 a mihcaan kaapuyu' nu demiad, Ya-ma-sin-i-lin mapeci'ay a hekal makay 4,150 emang kung-cin macakat katukuh 5,870 emang kung-cin lecaday tu Pu-taw-yaay tu tusa kaahebal nu hekal. angangan lalekalan malukay nu Pa-si a yadah ku nilacu saahebal sa miletek tu yadaay a udad abuyu' paluma' tu kumuh atu sasimalan a cung. "sisimal ku cowng-li" i 2004 a mihcaa 7 a bulad a katatengilan, kesey paayaw tu yadahay udad a buyu' a caay tu kahiza nu ayaway tu paymihcaan masulup ku lasubu emang kun-tun ku labuay a akuti nu bali, lalekalan mangaleb ku kalamkam ku nikapeci' nu yadaay udad a buyu'. uyni 2003 a mihcaan dada', izaw ku 9,169 pin-bang inb-li ku maletekay tu a kilang. śĖľ2004ŚĻī7 . i Pa-siay dada', macaliway tu 90 ku niyazu' nu Yincumincu i 1900 a ziday malawpes nu imelang atu nikalalais, pinaay tu a mihcaan ku nikasuped sakay yadaay udad a buyu' mauzipay aadupan u tineng aca nu isingay malasawad tu. uyni a lala' lalid sa maletek ku kilakilangan mapeci' tu atu masibek tu mapatay ku mulangawa mauzipay, tinaku u Mi-lu Ya-ma-sin, tiniay a Yincumincu haymaw satu mahedaw. . 2023 a mkihca 6 a bulad 5 ademiad, Pa-si a Cung-tung ci Lu-la pangangan tu nisulitan, panutekan i 2030 a mihcaan katukuh Ya-ma-sin-i-lin "inayi' tu ku miletekay" anu pina ku niletekan ahatiza ku nipaluma tu kilang. 2023ŚĻī6śúą5śó•, . kikasumad nu demiad malilid tu ku Ya-ma-sin-i-lin izaw tahkal ku nisulitanYa-ma-sin-i-lin mulangaway iayaw 210,000 a mihcaan, milihiza tu sazikuzay tu nu kuliamim a mihcaan atu kalananuman a mihcaan "deglaciation", tabaki ku nikasumad. namasaheci tu ku kitizaan nu Ya-ma-sin ku-bu "paleolake" atu ku nikasaupu nu maleneknek a tuud, tahkal ku nasulitan sazikuzay a kulian a mihcaan maselep ku udad kikaadidi'an tu nu ayzaan. mahiniay kanca taneng amin zayhan masatancunay a lala' masuemet ku akuti'ay u nikaselep nu lutuk. itawya ahebal ku nikaselep nu lutuk, ke-sye-cya caay kalecad ku nipisakamu. hiniasa ku zuma a ke-sye-cya adidi' tu ku i-lin zuma caay tu kayadah atu kalaliyas nu tanengay a siwawa a kitizaan "refugium", mapalaed nu ahebalay akilakilangan atu nalinabuwan, hinisa ku ke-sya-cya mahizaay tu ku i-lin, uyza u nuamisan, nuwalian atu nutimulan caay kanayat katukuh tu nu ayzaay a kabatud. 005 a mihcaan, Ya-ma-sin milihiza tu 100 a mihcaan tu pihacengay a kakelad, lalid tu sakatusa a mihcaan nu kakedal. 2006 a mihca 7 a bulad 23 a demiad , I-ng-kow pasakamu i wangcan, Lin-tung migingkiway a cungsin "Woods Hole Research Center" patahal tu pulung a kawaw, uyza u kayadah ku liletekan tu kilang, sisa makedal tu ku Ya-ma-sin, kalamkam a hamin nu kakitizaan micuzuh pasayza i "nikasumad" "Ing a kamu, "tipping point" anu yadahay udad a buyu' amanukas tu malingatu mapatay. kilakilangan i tapiingan tu nu likelikenan, sakay hamin nu ti-ciw malilid nu demiad a masatubuc. Hhkay a malawpes ku kitakit. . pihaceng ku kaliidŚöīťáćŚĹĪťüŅ makay 2019 a mihcaan malingatu, Ya-ma-sin yadahay udad zayhan macaliway tu ku niletekan, nu hekalay, kikasumad nu demiad a kawaw tultultul sa a matuduh, katukuh 2019 a mihca 8 a bulad, Ya-ma-sin-i-lin i 8 a bulad tu cayay katanayu'a demiad pakal tu 4 emang ku nikatuduh, palalecad tuyza a mihcaan tu 2018 a mihcaan macunus tu ku 77% pasen. A-mey-lika a kanatal pulung nu pahikukiay "NASA" patahkal tu pinaay i 8 a bulad nisasing nu wiy-sin tahkal ku nisasingan,Lang-tu -ni-ya-cow atu Ya-ma-sin-cow zayhan namakatuduh tu nu wacah satu ku tapuku, uyni a wacah i pabaw nu Ya-ma-sin a sauwac masacacayay a salining, i Pa-si kasakitizaan mulalad, tuwaca laed tu Lang-towni-ya-cow 2200 kung-liay a Sin-paw-low a ktizaan, malilid tu nu waca a nikatuduh nu kilakilangan, mahetik ku "lumeni'ay a udad", u nipatatenga' i udad izaw ku nisuped tu masaatiladay a nikatuduhan. i-lin namatuduh tiniay i yadahay udad a buyu' nu muenengay aadupan yadah ku mapatayay. ayzaay katukuh tu tulu a lalipayan a nikatuduh caay edapen nu tiniay Pa-siay a tademaw, yu matineng tuyni a kawaw ku kitakitay zikuz, Pa-si cong-tung ci Ya-i-al¬∑Poe-su-na-low makaynah tu, Ow-COW a binawlan amin sabeleng satu tazazan musakamu tu Pa-si a pipadeng tu lamal, , Ya-i-al¬∑Pow-su-na-low-i zayhan Ba-kow cung-tung ci Ma-ke-hung paewang i G7 satabakiay a kaygian a palaayaw matatengil tu nikatuduh nu Ya-ma-sin uyni kacenuhan a kawaw atu u silaeday masasukaynah, Ya-i-al¬∑Pow-su-na-low hinisa "milihizaay tu kawaw nu Pa-si" atu hinisa "caay pabeli tu kalisie a miedap tu katuudh ku Pa-si". satu Ya-i-al¬∑Pow-su-na-low-I penecen tu cin-ciw kya paculcul tu hitay papipaneng tu lamal. zuma a kanatal malingatu tu sida'it ku tademaw amin u liyuh nu Pa-si a cen-hu atu Ya-ma-sin-i-lin anuayaw a kalihanawan. uyni tabakiay a nikatuduh mabuhat tu ku nuayaway nu Ya-ma-sin-i-lin ahebal ku nikacunus tu niletekan atu Ya-i-al¬∑Pow-su-na-low-I tu kalungad nu i-lin a kungku. u matuayay nu Pow-su-na-low caay kaaku sa pakalingestu tu Pa-si a kanatal tay-kung migingkiway a yen-cang ci Li-ka-tow¬∑cya-al-wang "Ricardo Galvao", malingatu tu masasukaynah a tatusa. zikuz Pow-su-na-low i pipenec nu kasakitakit hawsa pasakamu tu hamin nu kanatal i 60 a demiad lacus a tuduhen ku kilang tu pilisimet tu sakalukan a lala'. (Ricardo Galvao)ŚŹćśďä, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
